chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ إِلَى صَاحِبِ الدَّارِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – The Indication and the wordings upon the Master<sup>asws</sup> of the world (12<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/2)
text: أَرَانِي أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ ابْنَهُ وَ قَالَ هَذَا صَاحِبُكُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِي .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Makfouf, from Amro Al Ahwazy who said,
‘Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) showed me his<sup>asws</sup> son and said: ‘This is your Master<sup>asws</sup> from after me<sup>asws</sup>’’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Kufi from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Makfuf from ‘Amr al-Ahwazi who has said the following. “Abu Muhammad (a.s.) showed me his son and said, “This will be your master (Leader with Divine Authority) after me.”
